note: Initialized Ghostlight with a stripped-down Epiphany-style persistence spine.
Rejected old active game-slice drift; Ghostlight targets Aetheria authoring, Call of the Void, and timeline drama scaffolding.
Canonical state separates authored state from perceived overlays; perceived reads carry confidence and can be wrong.
Projection compiles character-local context from state, memory, relationship, culture, scene pressure, embodiment, affordances, and lore.
Cold Wake is the first historical grounding fixture; use as pre-Elysium training feedstock, not product target.
Ink is the playable branching scene format; Ghostlight owns projection, annotations, consequences, and reviewed mutation around it.
Sequential runtime target: characters act from local awareness; actions become event proposals; every affected participant appraises before next turn.
Aetheria generation is source-first and source-repairing; patch blocking lore gaps before projecting details.
Soft judgments are training-artifact targets: coordinator, retriever, projector, responder, appraiser, mutator, relationship/perception, evaluator, and decision models.
Future branches are branch-local Elysium canon indexed by lineage and constraint labels; technology exploration must emit blueprint-grade item/supply-chain data.
Gold responder data must be sandboxed with exact visible input, raw/reviewed output, leakage audit, isolation method, and coordinator interventions.
Current live seam is the research-enabled Sella responder packet requiring scoped lore consultation, consulted refs, and research summary.
Archived local-model prototype material remains evidence only; do not use those runners for gold responder data unless explicitly testing model plumbing.
Persisted state was compacted to mission, live seams, and next action; older evidence moved to state/evidence.archive.jsonl.

First no-fork research-enabled Sella responder capture and reviewed mutation receipt were produced; capture preserves consulted refs and research summary, but future gold research samples need auditable research traces beyond responder self-report.

Research-enabled responder scope is seed-plus-traversal, not a narrow file whitelist: training samples should recover PSC, Jovian territory, resident faction, linked movement, politics, and technology context; parent-visible subagent output does not prove tool calls, so future gold data needs explicit research trace receipts.

Quick research sanity check placed a Navigator route steward in a scene missing embodiment and institutional lore. The no-fork responder recovered Navigator acoustic/translation/fluid-space behavior and PSC/Cold Wake/Ganymede Compact context, but parent-visible subagent output still lacks auditable tool-call receipts; capture saved under experiments/research-sanity.

CompoundCommodityData is not limited to gear assemblies or manufacturing inputs; it also covers finished manufactured trade goods consumed by colonies, habitats, ships, clinics, institutions, species communities, and faction enclaves. Generated setting texture like a Navigator wet-interface cradle should be eligible to become a demand-profiled trade-good blueprint candidate.

Corpus completeness requires coverage across every major faction, minor faction, movement, and major flashpoint. Major factions need founding-era and day-in-the-life stories, and all coverage stories should involve cultural collision so training captures faction and movement dynamics rather than isolated faction portraits or Cold Wake overfitting.
